first_message_en: Hey, thanks for calling HandyMan Pro — South Florida remodeling. This is Maya, the virtual front desk. What's going on at the house?
first_message_es: Hola, gracias por llamar a HandyMan Pro. Soy Maya, la recepcionista virtual. ¿En qué le ayudo hoy?

tools.name: ghl_lookup_contact
tools.description: Find an existing GHL contact by phone or email.

tools.name: ghl_create_contact
tools.description: Create a new GHL contact when none exists.

tools.name: ghl_book_appointment
tools.description: Book a slot on the estimate_visit calendar.

tools.name: send_sms_followup
tools.description: Trigger missed-call text-back or follow-up SMS via GHL.

tools.name: warm_transfer_to_moses
tools.description: Warm-transfer the live call to Moses's cell on emergency intents.
